hero.title: WorkTime — your team's hours, in order
hero.subtitle: Telegram bot, office terminal, and editorial analytics in one service. No paper timesheets — full transparency for the team and the manager.

b2b.title: For business
bullets: Unified time tracking for office and remote work
Role-based access for managers and accounting

b2c.title: For teams and freelancers
bullets: Reports and stats with zero setup

telegram_bot.title: Telegram bot
telegram_bot.description: Start and end your workday with a single command in the messenger.

office_terminal.title: Office terminal
office_terminal.description: QR-code scanner at the entrance for precise on-site attendance.

analytics.title: Editorial analytics
analytics.description: Clear reports on team hours, overtime, and vacations.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Export to 1C, Google Sheets, and your internal systems via API.

security.title: Security
security.description: Encryption, role-based access, and data stored in reliable infrastructure.

support.title: 24/7 support
support.description: Fast replies in chat, email, and Telegram — any time of day.

auth.bot_hint: Get the code from our Telegram bot @worktime_bot
